channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: South Korean investigators push to summon impeached president as court set to determine his fate
item.description: SEOUL, South Korea (AP) — South Korean law enforcement authorities are pushing to summon impeached President Yoon Suk Yeol for questioning over his short-lived martial law decree as the Constitutional Court began its first meeting Monday on Yoon’s case to determine whether to remove him from office
item.dc:creator: KIM TONG-HYUNG and HYUNG-JIN KIM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Josh Allen has another huge game to lift Bills to a 48-42 victory that snaps Lions' winning streak
item.description: Allen ran for two scores in the first quarter and threw two touchdown passes in the second half, leading the Buffalo Bills to a 48-42 victory Sunday that snapped the Detroit Lions ' franchise-record 11-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lakers announce that LeBron James is available against Grizzlies after 2-game absence
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers announced LeBron James is available for Sunday night's game against the Memphis Grizzlies after a two-game break for personal reasons.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: US agencies should use advanced technology to identify mysterious drones, Schumer says
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — After weeks of fear and bewilderment about the drones buzzing over parts of New York and New Jersey, elected officials are urging action to identify and stop the mysterious flights. “There’s a lot of us who are pretty frustrated right now,” Rep. Jim Himes, D-Conn.
item.dc:creator: BIANCA VÁZQUEZ TONESS and DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Law enforcement, Humane Society rescue hundreds of animals in alleged cruelty case
item.description: Pigs on the property had no sign of access to food or water, while the goats had a frozen water trough.
item.dc:creator: Mario Gonzalez/KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: Vintage performances by Davante Adams and Aaron Rodgers carry Jets past defenseless Jaguars 32-25
item.description: Davante Adams and Aaron Rodgers gave the New York Jets' next general manager and head coach something to ponder with a glimpse into the past — and potentially the future.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Indiana man arrested after asking for a ride and then shooting at the driver
item.description: An Angola man was arrested after asking a woman for a ride, and then allegedly shooting at her in her car when she arrived.
item.dc:creator: Marin Murphy, WFLA, NBC

item.title: California DMV apologizes for Cybertruck's license plate but family cites misinterpretation
item.description: On Thursday, the license plate in question, which was on a Tesla Cybertruck, was spotlighted in a post to X by StopAntisemitism, a group “dedicated to fighting anti-Semitism.” The family, however, argues it is being misread.
item.dc:creator: Vivian Chow, NewsNation

item.title: Storms across US bring heavy snow, dangerous ice and a tornado in California
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — A tornado near a mall in central California swept up cars, uprooted trees and sent several people to the hospital. In San Francisco, authorities issued the first-ever tornado warning. Elsewhere, inclement weather plagued areas of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: JOSH FUNK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 2 Boston men arrested for flying drone near international airport
item.description: A Boston police officer detected an "unmanned aircraft system," operating "dangerously close" to the airport.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: Utah ski patrol association authorizes strike against Vail Resorts
item.description: Park City ski patrol said that despite months of meetings, "little progress has been made on a proposed wages, benefits, and education package.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, NewsNation

item.title: 2 teens killed, 4 injured in shooting at makeshift club in Houston
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Two teens were killed and four were injured — including a 13-year-old girl — in a shooting at a makeshift club in Houston, police said Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Storms encase Iowa and eastern Nebraska in ice and generate rare tornado warning in San Francisco
item.description: A major ice storm created treacherous driving conditions across Iowa and eastern Nebraska this weekend and prompted temporary closures of Interstate 80 after numerous cars and trucks slid off the road.
item.dc:creator: Josh Funk, ABC 4

item.title: UK hockey team retires Adam Johnson's No. 47 to honor player who died after neck cut
item.description:
Adam Johnson made as big an impression off the ice as he did on it for the Nottingham Panthers.
The U.K. hockey team officially retired Johnson's No. 47 jersey on Saturday in tribute to the American forward who died after his neck was cut by an opponent’s skate during a game over a year ago.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Thousands of Santas and a few Grinches hit the streets for annual SantaCon bar crawls
item.description: Thousands of Kris Kringles and jolly Old St. Nicks are jamming streets, sidewalks and bars from Adelaide to Vancouver on Saturday for annual SantaCon charity pub crawls.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A look back at the most notable bankruptcies of 2024
item.description: This year saw its fair share of bankruptcies, with household names and century-old companies in the mix.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Pelosi 'on the mend' after hip replacement surgery in Germany
item.description: Former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.), who was hospitalized during a trip to Luxembourg, underwent hip surgery early Saturday, according to a spokesperson.
item.dc:creator: Steff Danielle Thomas, KRON4

item.title: Proposal to list border-crossing monarch butterflies as 'threatened' draws opposition
item.description: Monarch butterflies could be elevated to "threatened" species as proposed this week by the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service, but some officials in Texas say that would interfere with ranches and businesses and hurt the economy.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, WGN 9

item.title: Former governor spots mystery drones in Maryland, blasts feds for lack of transparency
item.description: Former Republican Gov. Larry Hogan of Maryland has said that he personally witnessed "dozens of large drones" flying above his home in Davidsonville, Maryland, on Thursday evening.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Drones, planes or UFOs? Americans abuzz over mysterious New Jersey sightings
item.description: CHATHAM, N.J. (AP) — That buzzing coming out of New Jersey? It's unclear if it's drones or something else, but for sure the nighttime sightings are producing tons of talk, a raft of conspiracy theories and craned necks looking skyward.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CATALINI and HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: The Detroit area's many Syrians are celebrating Assad's overthrow and planning long-delayed visits
item.description: DEARBORN, Mich. (AP) — Nizam Abazid is gleefully planning his first trip in decades to Syria, where he grew up. Rama Alhoussaini was only 6 years old when her family moved to the U.S., but she's excited about the prospect of introducing her three kids to relatives they've never met in person.
item.dc:creator: COREY WILLIAMS and MIKE HOUSEHOLDER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Lawmakers tell Apple, Google to prepare for TikTok ban
item.description: TikTok now plans to appeal to the Supreme Court and has asked the D.C. Circuit to put the law on hold while it appeals the case.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, KRON4

item.title: Supreme Court will hear Catholic charitable group's plea to be free from Wisconsin unemployment tax
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court on Friday said it would take up a new religious rights case over whether a Catholic charitable organization must pay Wisconsin's employment tax.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: A man has pleaded guilty to the death of a 5-year-old girl living in their Kansas homeless camp
item.description: TOPEKA, Kan. (AP) — A man who lived in a makeshift camp with a homeless 5-year-old Kansas girl and her father pleaded guilty Friday to first-degree murder and rape in connection with the child’s death.
item.dc:creator: JOHN HANNA and HEATHER HOLLINGSWORTH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: OpenAI's Altman will donate $1 million to Trump's inaugural fund
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is planning to make a $1 million personal donation to President-Elect Donald Trump's inauguration fund, joining a number of tech companies and executives who are working to improve their relationships with the incoming administration.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: TikTok's 'slotmachinequeen' charged with nearly $1 million charity fraud
item.description: The Limestone County Sheriff's Office said Downs solicited donations for a charity to aid domestic violence victims and homeless individuals.
item.dc:creator: Josiah Elmore, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Krispy Kreme offering green doughnuts for 2 days only
item.description: The Grinch is spreading more mischief than holiday cheer this year at Krispy Kreme after deciding to add his own twist to the chain’s iconic glazed donuts. The doughnut chain announced that Grinch Green doughnuts would be available at participating shops while supplies last.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Biden commutes roughly 1,500 sentences and pardons 39 people in biggest single-day act of clemency
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden is commuting the sentences of roughly 1,500 people who were released from prison and placed on home confinement during the coronavirus pandemic and is pardoning 39 Americans convicted of nonviolent crimes.
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Amazon to donate $1 million to Trump inauguration, matching Meta
item.description: E-commerce giant Amazon is planning to donate $1 million to President-elect Donald Trump’s inaugural fund, matching the amount Meta already donated to the incoming president’s inauguration.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dick Vitale says he's cancer-free after 4 bouts with disease in just over 3 years
item.description: Vitale had surgery in the summer to remove cancerous lymph nodes from his neck. He was previously treated for melanoma and lymphoma, and had radiation treatments last year for vocal cord cancer.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Back trouble and brain fog bothered suspect in UnitedHealthcare CEO killing, his posts show
item.description: After Luigi Mangione made the difficult decision to undergo spinal surgery last year for chronic back pain, he became a proponent of the procedure that changed his life for the better.
item.dc:creator: LEA SKENE and JENNIFER SINCO KELLEHER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Drone operators worry that anxiety over mystery sightings will lead to new restrictions
item.description: Drones for commercial and recreational use have grown rapidly in popularity, despite restrictions on who can operate them and where they can be flown.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KOENIG, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: North Dakota regulators OK underground storage for proposed Midwest carbon dioxide pipeline
item.description: BISMARCK, N.D. (AP) — North Dakota regulators approved permits Thursday for underground storage of carbon dioxide delivered through a massive pipeline proposed for the Midwest, marking another victory for a project that has drawn fierce opposition from landowners.
item.dc:creator: JACK DURA and STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Fentanyl found inside dolphins in Gulf of Mexico
item.description: Traces of fentanyl were found inside bottlenose dolphins that were found dead in the Gulf of Mexico, raising concerns that the deadly drug may be affecting other sea life.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, Fox 5

item.title: Bone-chilling cold returns to the Midwest in the wake of a storm that soaked the East Coast
item.description: PORTLAND, Maine (AP) — Frigid weather returned to the Upper Midwest on Thursday after a storm that swept up the East Coast delivered a blow to New England, packing powerful gusts that knocked out power along with a deluge of rain and warming temperatures that washed away snow and dampened ski resort
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE and DAVID SHARP, Associated Press, ABC 4
